name: Olive Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 1-quart glass measuring pitcher in microwave oven (about 30 seconds at High).
2. Add flour and blend to a smooth paste.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly.
4. Cook uncovered in microwave oven for 4 minutes at High, or until thickened. Stir vigorously after 2 minutes, then every 30 seconds.
Yield: About 1 cup.
